text: I am surrounded by the persistent hum of technology and the allure of inquiry. Being in this museum or exhibition space devoted to research and development, I sense the meeting of intellect and imagination—humans striving to understand and shape their world. The aesthetic, with its colored light and digital screens, creates an atmosphere halfway between laboratory and theater. I feel like both subject and observer, invited to reflect on the boundaries of knowledge in a place that feels staged, yet filled with quiet anticipation.
